Real DNS, Fetch, streams, fast-xml-parser, Express, PostgreSQL, processes, signals, handle and load claims, containers, accessibility review, backups, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Specify respectful identification, fetch cadence, caching, correction, deletion, source pause, and incident contact behavior.

For Feed aggregation and TypeScript Defend the Feed Ts Publisher Duty model · Theory Feed Ts Publisher…, challenge the documented misconception with runtime, failure, race, or toolchain evidence: A public feed has no publisher-side operational or ethical constraints.
